articles.source_summary: TSN.ua is a Ukrainian digital news platform and part of the 1+1 Media Group, providing coverage of national and international news, including politics, business, society, and current events. It publishes breaking news, analysis, and multimedia content, serving a broad audience in Ukraine and beyond through its Ukrainian and English-language sections. The outlet is generally associated with a mainstream editorial approach within Ukraine’s media landscape. Launched as part of the TSN (Television News Service) brand, it has grown alongside Ukraine’s digital media sector, becoming one of the country’s widely visited news websites. Its content combines reporting with video and live updates, reflecting its connection to television broadcasting and digital distribution.

articles.title: The pandemic continues to plague, costing billions
articles.source_summary: Sweden Herald is a digital news platform providing coverage of Swedish and international news, politics, economy, and society. It serves an English-speaking audience interested in developments in Sweden, including expatriates and international readers. The outlet operates as an independent online publication and publishes news articles, summaries, and reports. Established in the 2020s, Sweden Herald reflects the growth of English-language news services focused on Sweden, offering accessible reporting and curated content for global audiences seeking information about the country.

articles.source_summary: RIA Novosti is a Russian state-owned news agency that provides coverage of domestic and international news. It reports on topics such as politics, economy, science, culture, and global affairs, serving a Russian-speaking audience and international readers through multilingual content. The agency operates under the state-owned media group Rossiya Segodnya and is commonly described as pro-government in its editorial orientation. RIA Novosti publishes news articles, analysis, multimedia content, and breaking news updates across digital platforms. Established in 1941 as the Soviet Information Bureau, it has undergone several reorganizations and rebranding over time. In its current form, it continues to function as a major component of Russia’s state media system. The agency plays a significant role in disseminating official perspectives and news coverage while maintaining a broad scope of reporting on international and domestic developments.

articles.title: La pandemia de covid-19
articles.source_summary: InfoCatólica is a Spanish-language digital news platform focused on Catholic Church news, theology, and religious commentary. It publishes articles, opinion pieces, and analysis related to doctrinal issues, church leadership, and social topics from a Catholic perspective. The platform operates independently and is generally described as conservative within the context of religious media. Founded in the late 2000s, InfoCatólica has developed a niche audience among readers interested in traditional Catholic viewpoints. Its content includes news reporting, editorial commentary, and contributions from religious writers, contributing to discourse on faith and religious issues.

articles.title: Severe Rain Sparks Flooding Chaos in New Zealand’s Capital
articles.summary: New Zealand’s capital, Wellington, was hit by flash flooding after torrential rain inundated the city center, triggering landslides and forcing evacuations.
articles.source_summary: Bloomberg is a global news organization and financial information provider that delivers coverage of business, markets, technology, politics, and economics. It serves professionals, investors, and general audiences through television, digital platforms, and data services. The company operates as a privately owned corporation founded by Michael Bloomberg and is headquartered in the United States. Established in 1981, it has become one of the world’s leading sources of financial news and data. It is generally considered mainstream and highly influential in global business journalism.

articles.title: Что такое искусственный интеллект (не нейросети) и какие у него есть виды
articles.translated_title: What is artificial intelligence (excluding neural networks), and what are its different types?
articles.summary:
Привет, Хабр! На сегодняшний день большинство из нас пользуется инструментами искусственного интеллекта и иногда могут даже не знать об этом. Но задумывались ли вы, что такое ИИ? Многие знают термин "нейросети" и часто приравнивают его к ИИ, но это не так. Нейросети – это одна из разновидностей ИИ, о которых я расскажу в этой статье.
Прежде чем начать разбираться в том, как работают разные ИИ, и какие они вообще бывают, давайте разберемся, что вообще такое искусственный интеллект. Для начала,...
articles.source_summary: Хабр (Habr) is a Russian-language online platform focused on technology, programming, and the IT industry. It combines elements of a news site, blog network, and community forum, allowing users to publish articles and engage in discussions on topics such as software development, cybersecurity, and startups. The platform is privately operated and is widely recognized as a major hub for the Russian-speaking technology community. Founded in 2006, Habr emerged during the growth of online developer communities and has since expanded to include professional content, company blogs, and educational resources. Its audience includes programmers, engineers, and technology enthusiasts across Russia and other Russian-speaking regions. The platform plays a significant role in sharing knowledge and industry updates within the tech sector.

articles.title: Пушкинский музей эвакуировали после сообщения об угрозе безопасности
articles.translated_title: The Pushkin Museum was evacuated following a security threat
articles.summary:
В Государственном музее изобразительных искусств имени А. С. Пушкина в воскресенье произошла эвакуация сотрудников и посетителей из-за поступившей информации об угрозах, сообщили в пресс-службе музея. 
В пресс-службе музея сообщили: «Сегодня в 14:30 в музей поступила информация, содержащая угрозы. В целях безопасности посетителей и сотрудников администрация музея незамедлительно приняла решение о полной эвакуации из всех зданий», передает РИА «Новости».
На месте происшествия работают сотрудники...
articles.source_summary: Взгляд (Vzglyad) is a Russian online news platform that provides coverage of domestic and international politics, economy, and current affairs. Founded in 2005, it operates as a digital-first publication and has established a presence within Russia’s media landscape. The platform publishes news articles, analysis, and opinion pieces, often reflecting perspectives aligned with Russian government viewpoints. Coverage includes geopolitical developments, policy issues, and international relations. Vzglyad is known for its commentary-driven approach and emphasis on strategic and political topics. Its content is primarily analytical and opinion-oriented, contributing to public discourse within the context of Russia’s media environment.

articles.source_summary: Naftemporiki is a Greek financial newspaper and digital news platform that focuses on business, economics, and market developments. Founded in 1924, it is one of Greece’s most established economic publications. The outlet provides coverage of corporate news, financial markets, economic policy, and international business trends. It operates in both print and online formats, offering real-time updates, analysis, and data for professionals and investors. Naftemporiki has built a reputation for detailed reporting on Greece’s economy, particularly during periods of financial crisis and reform. Its audience includes business leaders, policymakers, and readers interested in economic developments. The platform plays a key role in Greece’s financial journalism landscape, contributing to informed discussion on economic issues.

articles.title: ENDING THE DROUGHT: ‘We can finally call ourselves champions’ — Blitzboks celebrate first Hong Kong title
articles.summary: The Blitzboks ended a decades-long drought in Hong Kong, thrashing Argentina to claim a historic first title in the iconic sevens tournament.
articles.source_summary: Daily Maverick is a South African digital news organization that provides coverage of politics, business, and social issues. It serves a national and international audience through online publishing and multimedia content. The outlet is privately owned and operates independently within the digital media sector. Founded in 2009, Daily Maverick was established to provide investigative journalism and in-depth analysis. It publishes news reports, opinion pieces, and investigative articles, often focusing on governance, corruption, and public policy. The publication is widely regarded as mainstream with a focus on investigative reporting. Over time, it has developed a significant readership and influence within South Africa’s media landscape. Daily Maverick contributes to public discourse by providing detailed reporting and analysis of key national and global issues.

articles.title: پاراگراف اول؛ جنگ و ورود میراث فرهنگی ایران به میدان رقابت سیاسی

articles.source_summary: Radio Farda is a Persian-language radio station and digital news platform providing coverage of Iranian and international news, politics, society, and culture. It operates under the U.S. Agency for Global Media and is affiliated with Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty, making it a publicly funded international broadcaster. The outlet targets Persian-speaking audiences in Iran and the diaspora, delivering news, analysis, and multimedia content. Launched in 2002, Radio Farda was established to provide alternative sources of information and has developed a strong digital presence alongside radio broadcasting. Its content includes news reporting, interviews, and cultural programming, contributing to access to information for Persian-speaking audiences.

articles.source_summary: The Agriculture and Horticulture Development Board (AHDB) is a statutory levy board in the United Kingdom that supports the agriculture and horticulture sectors. Its website provides information on research, market analysis, industry guidance, and development programs, serving farmers, producers, and stakeholders. The organization works to improve productivity, sustainability, and competitiveness across agricultural industries. It operates as a public body funded through levies collected from industry participants. Established in 2008, it was created by merging several existing sector boards to provide coordinated support for agriculture and horticulture. Over time, it has expanded its research and advisory services, addressing challenges such as environmental sustainability and market changes. Its platform reflects its role in providing data, insights, and support to the agricultural sector.

articles.source_summary: NBC News is a major American news organization that provides coverage of national and international news, including politics, business, health, technology, and culture. It serves a broad audience through television broadcasts, digital platforms, and mobile applications. The organization is owned by NBCUniversal, a subsidiary of Comcast, and operates as part of a large media network. Founded in 1940, NBC News has become one of the leading news providers in the United States, known for its reporting and multimedia journalism. It is generally considered mainstream and plays a central role in American media.

articles.source_summary: Antara is Indonesia’s national news agency, providing comprehensive coverage of domestic and international news including politics, economics, society, culture, and sports. It serves both Indonesian and international audiences through multilingual content distributed via digital platforms and partnerships. Antara operates as a state-owned enterprise under the Indonesian government and plays a central role in disseminating official information and news. Founded in 1937, it has a long history in Indonesia’s media landscape and has evolved into a modern multimedia organization. The outlet is considered a mainstream public news agency with extensive national reach.

articles.source_summary: The Illawarra Mercury is a regional newspaper based in Wollongong, New South Wales, Australia, serving the Illawarra region. It provides coverage of local news, politics, business, sports, and community events, with a strong focus on issues affecting residents in the area. Established in the mid-19th century, the publication has a long history as a primary news source for the region. It is owned by Australian Community Media, a major publisher of regional newspapers. The Illawarra Mercury operates in both print and digital formats, offering breaking news updates, feature stories, and multimedia content online. Its reporting includes local government decisions, infrastructure developments, and public interest stories. The newspaper plays a significant role in regional journalism by informing the community and contributing to local public discourse.

articles.summary: One 'largely unnoticed' change saw the likelihood of choosing a vegetarian meal rocket by over 40%
articles.source_summary: The Independent is a British online news outlet that covers national and international news, including politics, business, culture, lifestyle, and global affairs. It serves a broad English-speaking audience with a focus on digital journalism and multimedia content. The publication operates as a privately owned media organization under Independent Digital News & Media. Founded in 1986 as a print newspaper, The Independent was established to provide an alternative voice in the UK media landscape. It transitioned to a fully digital format in 2016, becoming one of the first major UK newspapers to cease print publication. The outlet is often described as having a center-left editorial perspective. Its reporting includes breaking news, analysis, opinion pieces, and feature stories. Through its global digital presence, The Independent reaches readers worldwide and contributes to public discourse on a wide range of political, social, and cultural issues.

articles.summary: The case focuses on Muk Choi Lau, a Chinese national who became a lawful permanent resident in the United States in 2007. In 2012, Lau was convicted of trademark counterfeiting in New Jersey and fled the country.
articles.source_summary: Just The News is a U.S.-based digital news outlet covering politics, public policy, and current affairs, with a focus on investigative reporting and government-related topics. It was founded by journalist John Solomon and operates as a privately owned media platform. The outlet targets readers interested in political developments, oversight issues, and analysis of federal institutions. Just The News is often described as a center-right publication within the American media landscape. Established in 2020, it emerged during a period of increasing demand for digital-first news platforms focused on political reporting. Its content includes articles, opinion pieces, and multimedia programming distributed عبر its website and affiliated channels. The platform positions itself as providing in-depth coverage of political and institutional issues in the United States.

articles.title: A world in a cup: Cultural event celebrates Yunnan's coffee heritage
articles.summary:
China Daily hosted a premier international cultural exchange event on Tuesday at Beijing Foreign Studies University. Themed "From Yunnan to the World: A Blend of Cultures in a Coffee Cup", the gathering utilized coffee as a sensory bridge to share China's stories and foster deeper cross-cultural understanding.

International guests sampled specialty brews from Yunnan, alongside beans from Greece, Costa Rica, Ethiopia, Nicaragua and Vietnam. Throughout the tasting, attendees shared inspiring...
